strings.dropDetail: Annotations will be flattened and each PDF will be permanently updated.
strings.errorNotPdf: The item is not a PDF file.
strings.errorCannotOpen: The PDF could not be opened.
strings.errorLocked: The PDF is encrypted or locked. Unlock it first, then try again.
strings.errorCannotCreateOutput: A temporary output PDF could not be created.
strings.errorSaveFailed: A flattened PDF could not be created.
strings.errorValidationFailed: The flattened PDF failed validation, so the original was not changed.
